channel.title: Projects on RePass Cloud
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on RePass Cloud

item.title: CurseDelete
item.description:
Service Status

CurseDelete is no longer actively maintained by RePass Cloud Pty Ltd. The source code is available open source on GitHub for community use.

This page is retained for historical reference only.

About CurseDelete

CurseDelete is a command-line utility designed to recursively delete all files and folders under a specified directory as quickly as possible. It was built to address the performance limitations of standard OS-level deletion tools when dealing with directories containing large numbers of files or deeply nested folder structures.

item.title: CveInfo
item.description:
Service Status

CveInfo is no longer actively maintained by RePass Cloud Pty Ltd. The source code is available open source on GitHub for community use.

This page is retained for historical reference only.

About CveInfo

CveInfo is a command-line utility for querying Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) information. It was built to support security operations and patch management workflows where engineers needed quick, scriptable access to CVE data without relying on a browser or a separate platform.

item.title: LunaVPN
item.description:
Service Status

LunaVPN is no longer operational and is not an active service operated by RePass Cloud Pty Ltd. All hosted service accounts are closed, subscriptions are not renewed, and support is not provided.

This page is retained for historical reference only.

About LunaVPN

LunaVPN was a VPN service built to provide online privacy and security using modern VPN technology.

Technology

WireGuard protocol: LunaVPN was built on WireGuard, selected for its modern cryptography, efficient design, and minimal attack surface. WireGuard provides a fast, auditable protocol with strong encryption primitives and significantly less code surface than older VPN protocols.

item.title: OptechX
item.description:
Service Status

OptechX is retired and is no longer an active service operated by RePass Cloud Pty Ltd. No customers are live on RePass Cloud operated OptechX infrastructure. No new subscriptions are offered and no renewals are processed. The hosted service is no longer operational and support is not provided.

This page is retained for historical reference only.

About OptechX

OptechX was a Software-as-a-Service platform designed to simplify the process of building custom Windows Standard Operating Environment (SOE) images and preparing them for deployment through common enterprise tooling.

item.title: TigerGrab 「とらグラブ」
item.description:
Service Status

TigerGrab is retired and is no longer an active product or service operated by RePass Cloud Pty Ltd. The product is no longer actively maintained or supported by RePass Cloud.

This page is retained for historical reference only.

About TigerGrab

TigerGrab 「とらグラブ」 was a Windows utility created for users who wanted a simple, reliable way to download and preserve online videos for personal archiving. It was designed to be straightforward to use without requiring technical configuration or third-party dependencies managed by the user.

item.title: WanderConnect
item.description:
Service Status

WanderConnect is retired and is no longer an active product or service operated by RePass Cloud Pty Ltd. The product is no longer actively maintained or supported by RePass Cloud.

This page is retained for historical reference only.

About WanderConnect

WanderConnect was a product concept focused on helping people discover local places and plan memorable experiences — including romantic dates, family outings, and solo exploration. It aimed to surface relevant local options in a way that reduced the friction of planning and discovery.
